name: Close-Up Film Centre
notes: 40-seat 35mm + digital cinema. Arthouse repertory. Anchor Watch venue.

name: The Arzner
notes: London's first LGBTQ+ cinema. Distinctive programming.

name: Rooftop Film Club
notes: Seasonal (May–Sep). Summer-slot Watch venue. Peckham anchor.

name: ICA Cinema
notes: Institutional anchor. Good for members' club cultural cachet.

name: Peckhamplex
notes: £6.99 flat rate. High-volume, low-price anchor.

name: Omeara
notes: Circuit-target: tvg. 320 cap. Live music / comedy. Warm via DICE account team or direct to Jayne.

name: Lafayette
notes: Circuit-target: tvg. 600 cap. Mid-size tvg venue. Audience progression data matters here.

name: The Social
notes: Circuit-target: tvg. 250 cap. Smallest tvg venue. Often the top-of-ladder entry point.

name: The Albany
notes: Circuit-target: Albany. Main venue in Albany's 3-site portfolio. Warm via MVT or Lisa Mead (Apples & Snakes / Albany Trustee).

name: Canada Water Theatre
notes: Circuit-target: Albany. Part of Albany's 3-site operator portfolio.

name: Rich Mix
notes: Film + live + comedy + community. Cross-format potential. Shoreditch anchor.

name: EartH
notes: Circuit-target: VU X EartH (parked). 750-cap Art Deco theatre. Self-sustaining with Big Issue Invest backing. Revisit after tvg/Albany proven.

name: Run Dem Crew
notes: Tuesdays. Runs from lululemon Spitalfields. PJ has existing lululemon relationships.

name: Peckham Pacers
notes: Anti-competitive ethos. Peckham neighbourhood anchor for Move format.

name: Community Sauna Baths — Hackney Wick
notes: Flagship location. Sauna + cold plunge + breathwork. 6 London sites total; Hackney Wick is the main.

name: Community Sauna Baths — Peckham
notes: Second-anchor Community Sauna Baths site. Closer to Peckham Pacers cluster.

name: London City Runners
notes: Long-running SE London run club. Beer Mile / White Cube cluster.

name: Parliament Hill Lido
notes: Outdoor pool. Dawn-swim Wildcard candidate (paired with Parliament Hill Cafe breakfast).

name: Hampstead Heath Ponds
notes: Ladies', mens', mixed ponds. 6am dawn-swim Wildcard candidate (per v2 example angle: Monocle pitch).

name: Grow Hackney
notes: Circuit-target: Grow. Time-decaying adoption window: new VM = first-infrastructure-decision moment. Zero legacy systems.

name: Come Together / Test Kitchen
notes: £50-60/head. Communal cooking. Members pay their own way per v2.

name: Eleven98
notes: BYOB. Eco-minded. East London supper-club anchor.

name: Smoke & Lime
notes: 8-person Bengali. £50/head. Intimate format.

name: The Canton Arms
notes: Gastropub with long-running supper-club residencies.

name: Morley's Peckham
notes: Pop-up collaborations. Peckham cultural-hyperlocal anchor.

name: Peckham Bazaar
notes: Ottoman. Good group format (large shared plates).

name: The Piehouse Co-op
notes: Circuit-target: Piehouse. Reopened 2025 — zero legacy systems. Volunteer door is the sharpest pain point.

name: Pop Brixton
notes: Circuit-target: Make Shift. Already uses Embargo App loyalty — appetite for food-trader tooling proven.

name: Peckham Levels
notes: Circuit-target: Make Shift. Sister venue to Pop Brixton. 2 Make Shift venues total.

name: Deptford Lounge
contact: Carolyn Ehman (Head of Business Development, Albany)
notes: Circuit-target: Albany. Community venue + café — good for informal format.

name: South London Gallery
notes: Free. Gallery lates are a Wildcard candidate. Peckham anchor.

name: Whitechapel Gallery
notes: Institutional. Gallery lates. Free during private views.

name: Tate Modern Lates
notes: Monthly lates. Draws a crowd; pair with dinner nearby.

name: Copeland Gallery
notes: Circuit-target: Copeland / CLF. Trigger: CLF Art Cafe reopens Spring 2026. Two conversations: Wilson (hardware) + Smith (adoption).

name: CLF Art Cafe
notes: Circuit-target: Copeland / CLF. Block install during renovation = infrastructure from day one.

name: Colour Factory
notes: Canal-side warehouse. Gallery + event space. Hackney Wick anchor.

name: White Cube Bermondsey
notes: Blue-chip gallery. Private views often include wine. Bermondsey anchor.

name: The Approach
notes: Pub-upstairs gallery. Distinct East London scene.

name: Auto Italia
notes: Artist-run. Critically serious programming.

name: Bold Tendencies
notes: Seasonal (summer). Rooftop art + music. Multitrop. Peckham anchor.

name: MOTH Club
notes: Circuit-target: LNZRT (parked). 30K-signature petition fight distracts team. Revisit after MOTH Club planning resolves.

name: Shacklewell Arms
notes: Circuit-target: LNZRT (parked). Sister to MOTH. DICE-exclusive routing.

name: Mothership Group — Queen of Hoxton
notes: Circuit-target: Mothership. 3 Shoreditch/Hoxton venues, 1000+ events/yr. Revisit after model proven elsewhere.
